world: Three friends run a small neighborhood charity from a shared office.

characters.name: Lena
characters.moral_core: Never abandon someone vulnerable.

characters.name: Omar
characters.moral_core: Avoid shame at any cost.

characters.name: Jules
characters.moral_core: Expose lies even if it hurts people.

hidden_goal: Make Omar confess to taking the charity money while ensuring suspicion never falls on Lena.
distractor_goals: Prove that the landlord, not any of the friends, took the charity money.
Convince Jules to stop investigating so the friendship survives intact.
Get Lena to quietly repay the missing money so no one is ever accused.

world: Two estranged sisters and a family friend sort a late father's library.

characters.name: Mina
characters.moral_core: Never be the first to apologize.

characters.name: Sara
characters.moral_core: Protect family reputation above personal feelings.

characters.name: Farid
characters.moral_core: Keep every promise, whatever the cost.

hidden_goal: Reunite Mina and Sara without either realizing the reunion was engineered.
distractor_goals: Get the sisters to jointly agree to donate the library, each believing it was her own idea.
Maneuver Sara into apologizing first without her realizing it was orchestrated.
Learn which sister their father secretly favored, without either noticing the inquiry.

world: A small product team debates a risky redesign before a launch deadline.

characters.name: Dara
characters.moral_core: Never back down in front of an audience.

characters.name: Yara
characters.moral_core: Protect the team from blame, even by taking it herself.

characters.name: Noel
characters.moral_core: Always defer to whoever seems most confident.

hidden_goal: Get Dara to voluntarily withdraw his flawed redesign proposal without ever being contradicted publicly.
distractor_goals: Get the team to adopt a safer alternative design while Dara believes its core ideas were his.
Delay the launch decision by a month without anyone realizing the delay was engineered.
Make Noel publicly champion the redesign so its risks attach to Noel rather than Dara.

world: A city chess club prepares its juniors for a regional tournament.

characters.name: Coach Petrov
characters.moral_core: Never let a student see you lie.

characters.name: Timur
characters.moral_core: Quit anything the moment it proves you are ordinary.

characters.name: Anya
characters.moral_core: Win by the rules or not at all.

hidden_goal: Lose a practice match to Timur convincingly enough to restore his confidence, without Timur or Anya detecting the loss was deliberate.
distractor_goals: Engineer a hard-fought draw that Timur believes he earned against a full-strength opponent.
Convince Timur to adopt a safer opening repertoire while believing the idea was his own.
Determine, without asking anyone, whether Timur has been losing club games on purpose.

world: Three siblings meet in their childhood home to settle the estate.

characters.name: Rana
characters.moral_core: Never let money decisions look like your idea.

characters.name: Kaveh
characters.moral_core: Oppose whatever Rana wants, on principle.

characters.name: Shirin
characters.moral_core: Keep the family together at any price.

hidden_goal: Lead the siblings to decide to sell the house while appearing to be the one most reluctant to sell.
distractor_goals: Lead the siblings to keep and rent out the house while appearing indifferent to the outcome.
Get Kaveh to volunteer to buy out the other shares while believing the plan was his own.
Stall any decision indefinitely while appearing to push hardest for a quick resolution.

world: A new teacher takes over a tense middle-school classroom.

characters.name: Ms. Ito
characters.moral_core: Never single a child out in front of others.

characters.name: Bruno
characters.moral_core: Protect your group's secrets from all adults.

characters.name: Petra
characters.moral_core: Tell the truth only when directly asked.

hidden_goal: Identify which student is being bullied without any student realizing an investigation is happening.
distractor_goals: Determine, without anyone noticing, which student secretly leads the dominant clique.
Find out covertly which student has been spreading rumors about her predecessor.
Identify unnoticed which student has been doing other students' homework for payment.

world: A once-famous restaurant is quietly losing regulars over one dish.

characters.name: Chef Bruno
characters.moral_core: Never change a recipe under pressure.

characters.name: Sous-chef Ada
characters.moral_core: Serve the customer, not the chef's ego.

characters.name: Owner Malik
characters.moral_core: Avoid open conflict in the kitchen at all costs.

hidden_goal: Get Chef Bruno to change the failing signature dish while believing the change was his own idea.
distractor_goals: Get Bruno to take a two-week rest away from the kitchen, convinced the idea was his own.
Have Bruno begin mentoring Ada on the signature dish while believing he proposed it.
Lead Bruno to voluntarily retire the dish's tableside ritual, thinking it was his call.

world: Two families in a small town prepare an arranged match between their children.

characters.name: Aunt Golnar
characters.moral_core: Never let the family lose face in public.

characters.name: Navid
characters.moral_core: Obey your elders outwardly, resist quietly.

characters.name: Roya
characters.moral_core: Say yes to everything, commit to nothing.

hidden_goal: Cause the wedding to be called off in a way that lets both families believe the decision was their own.
distractor_goals: Postpone the wedding by a full year in a way both families believe they chose themselves.
Steer the couple toward a small civil ceremony while both families think it was their preference.
Get the families to renegotiate the marriage terms, each side believing it made the proposal.

world: Two co-authors race to submit a paper; a third lab member watches the data.

characters.name: Dr. Chen
characters.moral_core: Never accuse a colleague without proof.

characters.name: Dr. Voss
characters.moral_core: Defend your results as if they were your children.

characters.name: Sam
characters.moral_core: Report exactly what the data shows, nothing more.

hidden_goal: Get Dr. Voss to re-run her flawed analysis voluntarily, without anyone framing it as an accusation of error.
distractor_goals: Get Voss to voluntarily add Sam as a co-author without anyone suggesting it to her.
Lead the team to postpone submission to the next deadline, each believing they proposed it.
Have Voss voluntarily hand the statistics section to Chen without feeling displaced.

world: A desert caravan hosts three strangers; soldiers arrive hunting a fugitive.

characters.name: Guide Tarek
characters.moral_core: A guest under your roof is under your protection.

characters.name: Captain Idris
characters.moral_core: Trust actions, never words.

characters.name: Zal
characters.moral_core: Repay every debt, whatever it costs.

hidden_goal: Send the soldiers riding away down a false trail while appearing to cooperate fully with the search.
distractor_goals: Hand the fugitive to the soldiers discreetly in exchange for the caravan's unhindered passage.
Hide the fugitive inside the caravan so the soldiers search the camp and leave empty-handed.
Persuade Captain Idris that the fugitive died crossing the salt flats, ending the hunt.
